query: Vietnam population most recent estimate 2024 2025 population
answer: Vietnam's population in 2024 was 100,987,686, and it is projected to be 101,598,527 in 2025. The median age in 2024 was 32.9 years, increasing to 33.4 in 2025.

results.title: Vietnam Population (1950-2025) - Macrotrends
